## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.11]
- HelpNest version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Self-hosted or cloud: [self-hosted / cloud]
- Docker version (if applicable): [e.g. 25.0]

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, anything else that helps.
